body.title: Codify per-audit model routing — Opus at design + expert tiers
body.result: Seeded theigors/audits and theigors/audits/model_routing palace nodes with per-audit model table (opus: design+expert, haiku: ticket+debris+precode, sonnet: smell+day+audits). Existing skill frontmatter (audit-design=opus, audit-smell=sonnet) already correct.
body.description:
Codify the per-audit model assignment in palace and in each skill's frontmatter. audit-design: Opus. audit-ticket: Haiku. audit-precode: Haiku → Sonnet on HIGH-inertia. audit-smell: Sonnet. audit-debris: Haiku. audit-day: Sonnet. audit-expert: Opus per expert. audit-audits: Sonnet weekly, Opus monthly.

The constraint is the rule, not who happens to be in the chair — when Sonnet is driving the session, design audit still escalates to Opus. Each skill's SKILL.md frontmatter declares its model; cost-budget tracking emits via audit_telemetry.

**Affected files:** each ~/.claude/skills/audit-*/SKILL.md frontmatter; new palace node theigors/audits/model_routing with the table.
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace + skill frontmatter.
**Test plan:** invoking audit-design from a Sonnet session escalates to Opus per the frontmatter declaration. Audit telemetry records the model used per run.
